data.title: Intensity Therapeutics Regains Compliance with Nasdaq's Minimum Bid Price Requirement
data.description: On March 6, 2026, in Shelton, Connecticut, Intensity Therapeutics, Inc., a company traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol INTS, announced its focus on developing innovative intratumoral cancer treatments aimed at eliminating tumors.

data.title: The International Society for CNS Drug Development (ISCDD) Honors Suresh Durgam, MD, with Prestigious Leadership Award at 24th Annual Meeting
data.description: In Las Vegas on March 6, 2026, the International Society for CNS Drug Development (ISCDD), a non-profit organization focused on advancing central nervous system drug development, revealed that Suresh Durgam, MD, received the prestigious ISCDD award.

data.title: Guiyang Confucius Academy Spring Festival Cultural Fair: A Global Invitation to Traditional Chinese Culture
data.description: On March 6, 2026, in Guiyang, China, the Guiyang Confucius Academy organized a cultural event celebrating the Spring Festival. The event showcased traditional rituals and classical music, attracting a global audience. The festivities included jubilant melodies that spread worldwide, embodying the spirit of the holiday. This cultural feast highlighted the rich heritage and traditions of Guiyang, uniting people from diverse backgrounds. The event demonstrated the significance of the Spring Festival in promoting cultural exchange, with a large attendance of local and international guests.

data.title: New tool by ElevenLabs creates custom synthetic voices for audiobooks, games, and creators, using generative model. #VoiceAI #Innovation
data.description: ElevenLabs has rolled out a groundbreaking generative model that enables users to create brand-new synthetic voices from the ground up. This innovation is specifically aimed at audiences in the audiobooks, games, and content creation sectors. This cutting-edge technology opens up endless possibilities for customization and creativity in voice production.
